common.name: Name
common.invalidData: Invalid data. Please review the fields.

landing.badge: SAFE, automated billing and operations system
landing.heroTitle: Generate your invoices automatically from timesheets
landing.heroDescription: SAFE helps law firms save time, reduce billing errors and execute faster, by transforming timesheets into invoices ready to validate in a single system.
landing.trust1: SAFE, automated billing and operations system
landing.trust2: Designed for firms of 1 to 5 lawyers
landing.trust3: Data security and dedicated space per firm
landing.whySafeTitle: The competitive edge: automatic invoicing from timesheets
landing.whySafeDescription: SAFE doesn't just store your data. It automates the transition from recorded time to an actionable invoice, for a faster, more reliable and more profitable firm.
landing.feature1Description: SAFE automates repetitive steps between timesheets, preparation and invoice issuance.
landing.feature2Description: Amounts, billed hours and billing items are consolidated more cleanly from timesheets.
landing.feature3Description: Move faster from time recording to an invoice ready to be validated and sent.
landing.automationTitle: From timesheet to invoice, without unnecessary friction
landing.automationDescription: Once hours are entered, SAFE structures the information to accelerate invoice preparation. The firm gains execution speed while reducing oversights and human errors.
landing.automationBullet3: The firm invoices faster and tracks performance better
landing.howItWorksTitle: Go from firm creation to billing in a few steps
landing.howItWorksDescription: SAFE guides you from initial setup to firm performance tracking, without unnecessary complexity.
landing.step1Description: Add the firm name, set up your main account and open your SAFE workspace.
landing.step2Description: Centralize legal matters, client contacts and essential information.
landing.step3Description: Track billable hours by matter, by lawyer and by activity.
landing.step4Description: Generate your invoices and track the firm's financial health in a single dashboard.
landing.trustTitle: Trust a system that transforms your timesheets into faster execution
landing.heroImageAlt: Premium preview of SAFE showing automatic invoice generation from timesheets
landing.automationImageAlt: Diagram showing the conversion of a timesheet into an invoice automatically in SAFE
landing.footerTagline: Automated billing and operations system for law firms.

clients.conflictCheckIntro: SAFE automatically searches the firm for potential conflicts as soon as a name is entered. Review the result before creating the client.
clients.conflictCheckIdle: Enter the client's name to trigger the automatic check.
clients.conflictCheckError: The automatic check failed. Try again or review existing matters manually before creating the client.
clients.conflictAcknowledge: I confirm I have assessed this conflict risk and approve creation regardless (document the rationale in the notes).
clients.conflictReason_existing_client_same_name: An existing client shares the same normalized name.
clients.conflictReason_existing_client_same_emai: An existing client uses the same email address.
clients.conflictReason_name_in_other_matter_titl: The name appears in another client's matter title (potential adverse party).
clients.conflictReason_matter_for_existing_clien: An open matter exists for a client with the same name.
clients.conflictReason_previous_conflict_recorde: A previous conflict check already flagged this name.

parametres.title: Settings
parametres.description: Firm configuration center: identity, team, compliance and operations.
parametres.sectionCabinetDesc: Identity, team and administrative preferences for the firm.
parametres.rowIdentityDesc: Legal name, address and contact details shown on invoices and correspondence.
parametres.rowBillingDefaultsDesc: Default currency, interest rate and invoice numbering format.
parametres.rowTeamDesc: Firm members, roles and module-level permissions.
parametres.sectionComplianceDesc: Law 25, Quebec Bar and traceability of sensitive actions.
parametres.rowRetentionDesc: Retention period and legal basis per document type (Law 25).
parametres.rowAuditDesc: History of sensitive actions: logins, changes, exports and archivals.
parametres.rowConsentDesc: Storage of disclosed consents (Law 25 and ethics rules).
parametres.sectionOperationsDesc: Client communications, accounting imports and firm automations.
parametres.rowInvoiceSendDesc: Secure unique links so clients can view an invoice without logging in.
parametres.rowImportsDesc: Bank statement imports and automatic rules for the expense journal.
parametres.rowBillingShortcutDesc: Direct access to invoices, payment tracking and credit notes.
parametres.rowNotificationsDesc: Email preferences, unpaid-invoice reminders and internal alerts.
parametres.v1Note: This V1 surfaces the structural settings. Editing forms for identity, billing preferences and notifications are coming soon.
parametres.auditDescription: Audit logs for Law 25 and Bar compliance.
parametres.cardCabinetDescription: Public identity of the firm, as shown on invoices and communications.
parametres.cardBillingDescription: Active billing settings. Currency and primary mode are fixed.
parametres.cardTeamDescription: Users who can sign in to SAFE and the firm's internal staff profiles.
parametres.cardComplianceDescription: Retention policies, audit trail, consents and conflict checks.
parametres.cardSubscriptionDescription: Current plan, monthly price and Stripe status of the firm.
parametres.cabinetLogoHint: HTTPS URL of a hosted image. Native upload coming in a future release.
parametres.cabinetTaxNumbersHint: Required on Canadian invoices when the firm collects HST/GST/QST. CRA format: 9 digits + RT0001.
parametres.cabinetHstNumber: HST No. (Ontario, NB, NS, NL, PEI)
parametres.cabinetEditDescription: Fields visible to clients on invoices, emails and generated documents.
parametres.cabinetEditInvalid: Please review the fields: name required, valid email and URL.
parametres.cabinetEditForbidden: You don't have permission to edit the firm identity.
parametres.subscriptionPageDescription: Details of your SAFE plan and management actions.
parametres.subscriptionCheckoutError: Unable to create the Stripe Checkout session.
parametres.subscriptionPortalError: Unable to open the Stripe portal.
parametres.subscriptionActivationRequired: Activate a Stripe subscription to access the SAFE workspace. Full access will return as soon as the Stripe webhook confirms payment.
parametres.subscriptionSetupHint: Choose a plan to activate Stripe.
parametres.subscriptionFeatureNote: All SAFE plans currently unlock the same feature scope. Pricing reflects firm size.

settingsUi.noticePlaceholderEn:
ALL SERVICES ARE SUBJECT TO HST

settingsUi.invoiceSendDescription: Configure the generation of unique links so your clients can view their invoices without signing in.
settingsUi.enableUniqueLinks: Enable unique links to send invoices to clients
settingsUi.uniqueLinksHelp: When this option is enabled, you can generate a secure link for each invoice sent. The client can view the invoice without signing in.
settingsUi.linkExpirationHint: Between 1 and 365 days. After this date, the link will no longer work.
